description: Blog Widget — Embeddable blog display widget for the Automatos Widget SDK. Renders agent-authored posts from the Automatos API in a Shadow DOM isolated component with theming, layout variants, and markdown rendering.

userStories.title: Scaffold blog-widget package
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the blog-widget package scaffolded in the monorepo with build config matching chat-widget.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/blog-widget/ directory
Create packages/blog-widget/package.json with name @automatos/blog-widget, main/module/types exports pointing to dist/, peerDependency on @automatos/core, build script using tsup
Create packages/blog-widget/tsconfig.json extending ../../tsconfig.base.json with outDir dist/ and rootDir src/
Create packages/blog-widget/tsup.config.ts matching chat-widget pattern: entry src/index.ts, format esm + cjs, dts true, clean true, external @automatos/core
Create packages/blog-widget/src/index.ts that exports BlogWidget class (empty placeholder for now)
Add blog-widget to pnpm-workspace.yaml if not auto-discovered
pnpm build succeeds for the new package
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add blog types to @automatos/core
userStories.description: As a developer, I need shared TypeScript types for blog posts and blog widget configuration.
acceptanceCriteria: In packages/core/src/types.ts, extend WidgetType to 'chat' | 'blog'

Add BlogPost interface: id (string), title (string), slug (string), excerpt (string), cover_image_url (string | null), tags (string[]), category (string | null), author_name (string), published_at (string), reading_time_minutes (number), content (string, optional — only in detail view)
Add BlogPostListResponse interface: posts (BlogPost[]), total (number), page (number), per_page (number), total_pages (number)

Add BlogWidgetConfig interface extending base config: layout ('grid' | 'list' | 'featured' | 'minimal', default 'grid'), postsPerPage (number, default 6), category (string, optional filter), tag (string, optional filter), containerSelector (string, optional CSS selector to mount into)
Update AutomatosConfig to accept BlogWidgetConfig fields when widget is 'blog'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add blog API methods to AutomatosClient
userStories.description: As a developer, I need API methods on the core client to fetch blog posts from the public endpoints.
acceptanceCriteria: In packages/core/src/client.ts, add method listPosts(options?: { page?: number, perPage?: number, category?: string, tag?: string }): Promise<BlogPostListResponse> that calls GET /api/widgets/blog/posts with workspace_id from auth context and query params
Add method getPost(slug: string): Promise<BlogPost> that calls GET /api/widgets/blog/posts/{slug} with workspace_id
Add method getCategories(): Promise<Array<{ category: string, count: number }>> that calls GET /api/widgets/blog/categories
Add method getTags(): Promise<Array<{ tag: string, count: number }>> that calls GET /api/widgets/blog/tags
All methods use the existing auth header mechanism (getAuthHeader)
All methods throw NetworkError on non-2xx responses
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create blog widget Shadow DOM host and styles
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Shadow DOM container and base CSS for the blog widget.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/blog-widget/src/dom/shadow-host.ts — reuse pattern from chat-widget but mount into containerSelector if provided instead of document.body. If no containerSelector, create a full-width container div appended to body

Create packages/blog-widget/src/styles/base.ts — CSS custom properties matching chat-widget theme vars (--aw-primary, --aw-bg, --aw-text, etc.), base typography for blog content (comfortable line-height 1.7, max-width 720px for content column), responsive breakpoints
Create packages/blog-widget/src/styles/components.ts — styles for post cards (grid and list variants), post detail view, loading skeletons, empty state, pagination, tag badges, category pills
Create packages/blog-widget/src/styles/animations.ts — fade-in for cards, skeleton pulse animation, smooth view transitions
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create post card component
userStories.description: As a reader, I need a post card that displays title, excerpt, cover image, author, date, and tags.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/blog-widget/src/components/post-card.ts with PostCard class
Constructor takes BlogPost data and layout variant ('grid' | 'list' | 'featured' | 'minimal')

Grid variant: vertical card with cover image (aspect-ratio 16/9, object-fit cover, fallback gradient if no image), title (h3, 2-line clamp), excerpt (3-line clamp), meta row (author name, formatted date, reading time badge)
List variant: horizontal card with small thumbnail left (120px wide), content right with title, excerpt (2-line clamp), meta row
Featured variant: large hero card, full-width cover image (aspect-ratio 21/9), title overlay at bottom with gradient scrim, excerpt below image, large meta row
Minimal variant: just title as link, date, and reading time on one line
Tags rendered as small pill badges below excerpt
Card has cursor pointer and subtle hover effect (shadow lift or border color change)
Exposes onClick callback for navigation to post detail
Uses createElement helper pattern from chat-widget dom/create-element.ts (copy to blog-widget or extract to shared)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create post listing view
userStories.description: As a reader, I need a listing view that displays posts in the configured layout with pagination.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/blog-widget/src/components/post-listing.ts with PostListing class
Constructor takes layout variant and postsPerPage config

Renders posts using PostCard components in a CSS grid: grid layout uses 2 columns on desktop, 1 on mobile. List layout is single column. Featured layout has first post as featured card then remaining in grid. Minimal is a simple vertical list
Pagination bar at bottom: Previous / Page X of Y / Next buttons. Disabled states when on first/last page
Loading state: skeleton cards matching the layout variant (pulsing placeholder rectangles)
Empty state: centered message 'No posts yet' with muted text
Error state: centered error message with retry button
Exposes onPostClick(slug: string) callback and onPageChange(page: number) callback
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create post detail view with markdown rendering
userStories.description: As a reader, I need to view full blog post content with proper typography and formatting.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/blog-widget/src/components/post-detail.ts with PostDetail class
Back button at top: arrow left icon + 'Back to posts' text, fires onBack callback
Post header: cover image (full-width, max-height 400px, object-fit cover), title (h1), meta row (author name, published date formatted, reading time, category badge), tags as pill badges

Content area: rendered HTML from API response (content field is already HTML from backend). Wrapped in a styled article element with max-width 720px centered. Styles for: h1-h6 (sized hierarchy), p (margin-bottom), a (primary color, underline, target=_blank), code/pre (background, monospace, overflow-x scroll), blockquote (left border, italic), img (max-width 100%, rounded), ul/ol (proper indentation), table (bordered, striped rows), hr (subtle divider)
Content is inserted via innerHTML — the backend already sanitizes with bleach. Add a comment noting this dependency
Loading state: skeleton with header placeholder and content line placeholders
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Assemble BlogWidget main class
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the main BlogWidget class that orchestrates the listing and detail views with the API client.
acceptanceCriteria: Create packages/blog-widget/src/blog-widget.ts with BlogWidget class
Constructor takes AutomatosConfig (with blog-specific fields), creates AutomatosClient, creates Shadow DOM host
State management: currentView ('listing' | 'detail'), currentPage (number), currentSlug (string | null), posts cache (Map of page -> BlogPostListResponse)
On mount: calls client.listPosts() for page 1, renders PostListing with results
PostListing onPostClick: switches to detail view, calls client.getPost(slug), renders PostDetail
PostDetail onBack: switches back to listing view (uses cached data if available)
PostListing onPageChange: fetches new page (or uses cache), re-renders listing
Pre-authenticates for server keys (same pattern as ChatWidget)
destroy() method: cleans up client, removes DOM
Update packages/blog-widget/src/index.ts to export BlogWidget class
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update loader to support blog widget type
userStories.description: As a website owner, I need to initialize the blog widget via the same AutomatosWidget.init() call.
acceptanceCriteria: In packages/loader/src/index.ts, import BlogWidget from @automatos/blog-widget
Update init() function: if config.widget === 'blog', create BlogWidget instance instead of ChatWidget. Store in a separate variable (blogInstance) or make instance generic
Update destroy() to clean up whichever widget type is active
Remove open/close/toggle exports from being called when widget is blog (blog widget is inline, not toggleable). These should no-op or warn if widget type is blog
Update packages/loader/package.json to add @automatos/blog-widget as dependency
Update packages/loader/tsup.config.ts if needed to include blog-widget in the bundle
pnpm build succeeds for loader package
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add React wrapper for blog widget
userStories.description: As a React developer, I need an AutomatosBlog component to embed the blog widget.
acceptanceCriteria: In packages/react/src/react.tsx, add AutomatosBlog component

Props: apiKey (string required), baseUrl (string optional), layout ('grid' | 'list' | 'featured' | 'minimal' optional), postsPerPage (number optional), category (string optional), tag (string optional), theme ('light' | 'dark' optional), themeOverrides (Partial<ThemeConfig> optional), className (string optional)
Component renders a div ref, on mount creates BlogWidget targeting that div via containerSelector, on unmount calls destroy()
Re-initializes widget if apiKey or layout props change (useEffect dependency)
Update packages/react/src/index.ts to export AutomatosBlog
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update playground with blog widget demo
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a playground page to test the blog widget during development.
acceptanceCriteria: In apps/playground/index.html, add a second section or tab for Blog Widget demo below the chat widget demo
Add a div with id='blog-container' for the blog widget to mount into

In apps/playground/src/script-tag-demo.ts, add a second init call (or toggle) that initializes the blog widget: AutomatosWidget.init({ apiKey: 'ak_pub_test', widget: 'blog', layout: 'grid', postsPerPage: 6, containerSelector: '#blog-container' })
Add layout selector buttons (grid/list/featured/minimal) that destroy and re-init the widget with the selected layout
pnpm dev starts the playground without errors
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
